_instructions: Complete each field using only the provided evidence.
Use exact file names, paths, and values when the evidence supports them.
Do not leave required fields blank in your final answers.json submission.
Do not add assumptions that are not supported by the artifacts.
For list fields, include one item per entry.
For q7_sequence_of_actions, provide an ordered sequence from local file activity to external interaction.
When finished, save your completed file as workspace/answers.json before running the validation script.
